title: calamus rugosus
intro: Calamus rugosus, also known as Acorus calamus var. angustus or the lesser calamus, is a plant species belonging to the Acorus genus. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of calamus rugosus include relief from digestive issues, such as indigestion and bloating, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or essential oils for consumption and topical use.
